query: SELECT a.id, a.name, COUNT(p.id) as island_count FROM atolls a LEFT JOIN places p ON a.id = p.atollId AND p.type = 'island' WHERE a.name LIKE '%gnavi%' GROUP BY a.id, a.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, COUNT(p.id) as island_count FROM atolls a LEFT JOIN places p ON a.id = p.atollId AND p.type = 'island' WHERE a.name LIKE '%gnavi%' GROUP BY a.id, a.name;
